data.reasoningText:
The solution file isn't actually triggering the individual project builds. This might be because the solution file format is missing the project configuration mappings. The `.sln` file has `GlobalSection(SolutionConfigurationPlatforms)` but doesn't have `GlobalSection(ProjectConfigurationPlatforms)`, which maps solution configurations to project configurations. Without that section, MSBuild won't know which projects to build for each configuration.

Let me check the solution file again more carefully, and try building an individual project to confirm they work.
